programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
programme.desc: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

programme.title: Kadak Singh
programme.desc: Waking up in a hospital with amnesia, a financial officer sets out to solve an embezzlement scheme. Despite being unable to remember anything about himself, he tries to find clues in others' accounts.

programme.title: Faraaz
programme.desc: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan café in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

programme.title: Madaari
programme.desc: Nirmal, a man who lost his son due to the negligence of the government, seeks revenge and kidnaps the ten-year-old son of the home minister, forcing the administration to meet his demands.

programme.title: 420 IPC
programme.desc: A young defence lawyer locks horns with a seasoned prosecutor in a tricky fraud case trial. It is only a matter of time before it becomes evident that victory will not come easy for either of them.

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

programme.title: Welcome
programme.desc: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

programme.title: Bhagam Bhag
programme.desc: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.
